calendar.matters:
Petition For Instructions Regarding The Terms Of Decedent'S Trust
Off Calendar Jun-29-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Russell Stanaland for and with Judith Fischer.

The Court stated that the tentative was to deny the petition without prejudice, that the will appeared to not be valid, that 18 pages were missing from the trust and that there was not enough information to determine how it was to be distributed. Mr. Stanaland presented oral argument to support his position. The Court directed Mr. Stanaland to submit supplemental pleadings in support of his position. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Ronald Quidachay. Reporter: Robert Balian, CSR#5220. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy D. Sum.

payments.description: PETN AND OPP RE INTERNAL AFFAIRS OF 17200 TRUST
